javascript:!function()%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bfunction%20main()%7Bif(%22function%22!%3Dtypeof%20initWDK)%7Bvar%20panel%3Dfunction()%7B!function()%7Bif(!document.getElementById(%22dk-panel-styles%22))%7Bvar%20style%3Ddocument.createElement(%22style%22)%3Bstyle.id%3D%22dk-panel-styles%22%2Cstyle.textContent%3D%5B%22.dk-panel%20%7B%22%2C%22%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%20top%3A%2060px%3B%20right%3A%2020px%3B%22%2C%22%20%20width%3A%20520px%3B%20height%3A%20420px%3B%20min-width%3A%20320px%3B%20min-height%3A%20220px%3B%22%2C%22%20%20background%3A%20%230a0a1a%3B%22%2C%22%20%20border%3A%201px%20solid%20%232a2a4a%3B%22%2C%22%20%20border-radius%3A%208px%3B%22%2C%22%20%20box-shadow%3A%200%204px%2032px%20rgba(0%2C%20229%2C%20255%2C%200.15)%2C%200%200%201px%20%2300e5ff%3B%22%2C%22%20%20z-index%3A%20999999%3B%22%2C%22%20%20display%3A%20flex%3B%20flex-direction%3A%20column%3B%22%2C'%20%20font-family%3A%20%22SF%20Mono%22%2C%20%22Fira%20Code%22%2C%20%22Cascadia%20Code%22%2C%20%22Consolas%22%2C%20monospace%3B'%2C%22%20%20font-size%3A%2013px%3B%20color%3A%20%23e0e0f0%3B%22%2C%22%20%20overflow%3A%20hidden%3B%20user-select%3A%20none%3B%22%2C%22%7D%22%2C%22.dk-panel.dk-hidden%20%7B%20display%3A%20none%3B%20%7D%22%2C%22.dk-titlebar%20%7B%22%2C%22%20%20display%3A%20flex%3B%20align-items%3A%20center%3B%20justify-content%3A%20space-between%3B%22%2C%22%20%20padding%3A%206px%2010px%3B%20cursor%3A%20grab%3B%22%2C%22%20%20background%3A%20linear-gradient(135deg%2C%20%2312122a%2C%20%230a0a1a)%3B%22%2C%22%20%20border-bottom%3A%201px%20solid%20%232a2a4a%3B%22%2C%22%20%20flex-shrink%3A%200%3B%22%2C%22%7D%22%2C%22.dk-titlebar%3Aactive%20%7B%20cursor%3A%20grabbing%3B%20%7D%22%2C%22.dk-title%20%7B%22%2C%22%20%20font-weight%3A%20700%3B%20font-size%3A%2013px%3B%20letter-spacing%3A%201px%3B%22%2C%22%20%20background%3A%20linear-gradient(90deg%2C%20%2300e5ff%2C%20%23b967ff)%3B%22%2C%22%20%20-webkit-background-clip%3A%20text%3B%20-webkit-text-fill-color%3A%20transparent%3B%22%2C%22%20%20background-clip%3A%20te .push(entry)%7D%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dtry%7Bfor(var%20metas%3Ddocument.querySelectorAll(%22meta%5Bname%5D%2C%20meta%5Bproperty%5D%2C%20meta%5Bhttp-equiv%5D%22)%2Cn%3D0%3Bn%3Cmetas.length%3Bn%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20prop%3Dmetas%5Bn%5D.getAttribute(%22property%22)%7C%7Cmetas%5Bn%5D.getAttribute(%22name%22)%7C%7Cmetas%5Bn%5D.getAttribute(%22http-equiv%22)%2Ccontent%3Dmetas%5Bn%5D.getAttribute(%22content%22)%7C%7C%22%22%3Bresult.metaTags.push(%7Bproperty%3Aprop%2Ccontent%3Acontent%7D)%2Cprop%26%260%3D%3D%3Dprop.indexOf(%22og%3A%22)%26%26(result.openGraph%5Bprop.slice(3)%5D%3Dcontent)%7D%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dreturn%20result%7Dfunction%20findHiddenData()%7Bvar%20result%3D%7BhiddenInputs%3A%5B%5D%2CdataAttributes%3A%5B%5D%7D%3Btry%7Bfor(var%20inputs%3Ddocument.querySelectorAll('input%5Btype%3D%22hidden%22%5D')%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Cinputs.length%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20formId%3Dnull%3Btry%7Binputs%5Bi%5D.form%26%26(formId%3Dinputs%5Bi%5D.form.id%7C%7Cinputs%5Bi%5D.form.getAttribute(%22name%22)%7C%7Cinputs%5Bi%5D.form.action)%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dresult.hiddenInputs.push(%7Bname%3Ainputs%5Bi%5D.name%7C%7Cinputs%5Bi%5D.id%7C%7Cnull%2Cvalue%3A(inputs%5Bi%5D.value%7C%7C%22%22).slice(0%2C500)%2Cform%3AformId%7D)%7D%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dtry%7Bfor(var%20allEls%3Ddocument.querySelectorAll(%22*%22)%2Ccount%3D0%2Cj%3D0%3Bj%3CallEls.length%26%26count%3C50%3Bj%2B%2B)%7Bfor(var%20el%3DallEls%5Bj%5D%2Cattrs%3Del.attributes%2CdataAttrs%3D%7B%7D%2ChasData%3D!1%2Ca%3D0%3Ba%3Cattrs.length%3Ba%2B%2B)0%3D%3D%3Dattrs%5Ba%5D.name.indexOf(%22data-%22)%26%26(dataAttrs%5Battrs%5Ba%5D.name%5D%3D(attrs%5Ba%5D.value%7C%7C%22%22).slice(0%2C200)%2ChasData%3D!0)%3Bif(hasData)%7Bvar%20tag%3Del.tagName.toLowerCase()%2Cid%3Del.id%3F%22%23%22%2Bel.id%3A%22%22%2Ccls%3Del.className%26%26%22string%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20el.className%3F%22.%22%2Bel.className.trim().split(%2F%5Cs%2B%2F).slice(0%2C2).join(%22.%22)%3A%22%22%3Bresult.dataAttributes.push(%7Belement%3Atag%2Bid%2Bcls%2Cattributes%3AdataAttrs%7D)%2Ccount%2B%2B%7D%7D%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dreturn%20result%7
